name: Store Finder
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder1.05T5g00000sBUDNEA4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder1.05T5g00000sBUDNEA4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The store finder add-on requires either the Online Store, or B2B Ecommerce add-ons."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install the Store Finder Add-on"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Store Finder", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once activated, a "}, {"text": "Store Finder", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu option will appear under the "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the a Store Finder"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the add-on installed, you now need to add your store locations:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Store Finder", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the store."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the store is also one of your warehouses, select it next to "}, {"text": "Warehouse store", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the store has a customer account on your site, you can link the customer to this store. To do this check "}, {"text": "Change user?", "bold": true}, {"text": " and search for a customer and click on the username in the search results."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Description", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder2.05T5g00000sBUE1EAO.jfif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder2.05T5g00000sBUE1EAO.jfif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 500, "height": 432}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the stores address. The "}, {"text": "Latitude", "italic": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Longitude", "italic": true}, {"text": " will be generated based on the address."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also relate the store to product categories on the "}, {"text": "Store Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Store Logos", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab you can upload a logo for this store."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder3.05T5g00000sBUEfEAO.jfif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder3.05T5g00000sBUEfEAO.jfif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 500, "height": 426}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also create a store from a customer card by scrolling down to the "}, {"text": "Store Locations", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and clicking on the "}, {"text": "Add New Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder4.05T5g00000sBUEzEAO.jfif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder4.05T5g00000sBUEzEAO.jfif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 500, "height": 72}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Store Finder Page"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "So that your customers can use the store finder, you will need to create a page for it on your site. To create the page:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Web Page", "bold": true}, {"text": " (in some control panels the menu is "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Information Page", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a page "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Template & Design", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and under "}, {"text": "Body Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " select "}, {"text": "store_finder", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your template is not in the list, contact your web designer or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/designtweak.html?", "children": [{"text": "a design partner"}]}, {"text": " to create it for you."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to finish adding the page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder5.05T5g00000sBUFJEA4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StoreFinder5.05T5g00000sBUFJEA4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image5", "width": 500, "height": 272}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
